channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Ruby (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Ruby nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 0din-ai/ai-scanner (371 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: 0din-ai

📝 Repository: 0din-ai/ai-scanner

📄 Descrizione: AI model safety scanner built on NVIDIA garak

⭐ Stelle: 371

🍴 Forks: 66

💻 Linguaggio: Ruby

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-19T21:41:41Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-30T23:30:15Z

]]>

item.title: 📝 smgdkngt/dobase (145 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: smgdkngt

📝 Repository: smgdkngt/dobase

📄 Descrizione: Open-source, self-hosted workspace with installable tools. Mail, boards, docs, chat, todos, files, calendar, and video rooms. Deploy with ONCE, Kamal, or Docker.

⭐ Stelle: 145

🍴 Forks: 4

💻 Linguaggio: Ruby

🏷️ Topics: collaboration docker hotwire once-compatible open-source pwa rails self-hosted sqlite workspace

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-13T08:34:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-31T02:06:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 crisnahine/rails-ai-context (62 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: crisnahine

📝 Repository: crisnahine/rails-ai-context

📄 Descrizione: Give AI agents a complete mental model of your Rails app - 30 tools via MCP or CLI. Zero config. Auto-generates context files for Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and OpenCode.

⭐ Stelle: 62

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: Ruby

🏷️ Topics: ai claude copilot cursor developer-tools introspection llm mcp model-context-protocol opencode rails rails-ai ruby

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-18T05:54:18Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-30T17:19:02Z

]]>

item.title: 📝 Alexey-Lukin/silken_net (17 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Alexey-Lukin

📝 Repository: Alexey-Lukin/silken_net

📄 Descrizione: Silken Net: A decentralized Nature-as-a-Service (NaaS) platform. Bridges edge computing IoT sensors in forests with Polygon blockchain via an Oracle to mint Carbon and Forest Coins based on real-time biological telemetry and Lorentz attractor homeostasis.

⭐ Stelle: 17

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Ruby

📜 Licenza: No license
